creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 179425
patch

There's currently no port for APCu for PHP 7.1. This patch requires repocopy from devel/php70-APCu. I didn't change the maintainer as the port is simple enough to maintain, however if the current maintainer (daniel@blodan.se) isn't willing to maintain this additional port, I can do it.

The port itself builds fine on Poudriere on FreeBSD 10.3.
